title: Text Streaming Flow
description: Streaming text generation via SSE parsing, stream event emission (TextStart, TextDelta, TextEnd, ReasoningDelta), and Vercel protocol output
activity_flow: START: Gateway.processTextStream(invocationId, provider, model, tools, schema, options, streamBody, depth)
INIT: generate messageId (UUID v7); set flags: streamStartEmitted=false, textStartEmitted=false; currentText=''; pendingToolCalls=[]
LOOP: foreach ParsesServerSentEvents.parseServerSentEvents(streamBody) as $data
[SSE PARSE]: readLine(streamBody) byte-by-byte → trim → skip blank or non-data: lines → skip '[DONE]' → json_decode → yield decoded object
BRANCH on event type:
[error] → yield Error event → RETURN (terminate stream)
[stream-start trigger] → if !streamStartEmitted → emit StreamStart(provider, model) → streamStartEmitted=true
[text delta] → if !textStartEmitted → emit TextStart(messageId) → textStartEmitted=true; accumulate currentText; emit TextDelta(messageId, deltaText)
[text done] → if textStartEmitted → emit TextEnd(messageId); textStartEmitted=false (Anthropic resets per block)
[reasoning delta] → if !reasoningStartEmitted → emit ReasoningStart(reasoningId) → reasoningStartEmitted=true; emit ReasoningDelta(reasoningId, delta)
[reasoning done] → emit ReasoningEnd(reasoningId); reset reasoningId
[tool_call accumulation] → accumulate pendingToolCalls[] with id/name/arguments fragments
[tool_call complete] → emit ToolCall event (OpenAI: on function_call_arguments.done; Anthropic: on content_block_stop with tool_use; Groq: post-loop)
[provider tool events] → emit ProviderToolEvent (server_tool_use blocks, web_search etc.)
[usage/completion data] → capture Usage(inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheTokens, reasoningTokens)
END LOOP
POST-LOOP BRANCH:
[pendingToolCalls filled] → call handleStreamingToolCalls()
TOOL EXECUTION LOOP: foreach mappedToolCalls → findTool → executeTool → new ToolResult → emit ToolResult event
DEPTH CHECK: if depth+1 < maxSteps → build next request body → HTTP POST (stream=true) → recursive processTextStream(depth+1)
DEPTH EXCEEDED → emit StreamEnd('stop', Usage(0,0))
[no tool calls] → emit StreamEnd(finishReason, usage)
VERCEL OUTPUT: CanStreamUsingVercelProtocol.toVercelProtocolResponse()
Headers: Content-Type=text/event-stream, x-vercel-ai-ui-message-stream=v1, Cache-Control=no-cache

gateway_variations.openai_responses_api: Event types: response.created, response.output_text.delta, response.output_text.done, response.reasoning_summary_text.delta, response.output_item.done, response.function_call_arguments.delta/.done, response.completed
gateway_variations.anthropic: Event types: message_start, content_block_start (block types: text/thinking/tool_use/server_tool_use), content_block_delta (text_delta/thinking_delta/input_json_delta/signature_delta/citations_delta), content_block_stop, message_delta. Supports citations (CitationEvent) and thinking blocks.
gateway_variations.groq_chat_completions: Delta format: choices[0].delta.content. TextEnd emitted post-loop. Tool calls via delta.tool_calls[]. finish_reason=tool_calls triggers tool loop.

stream_events: StreamStart(id, provider, model, timestamp) → Vercel: null
TextDelta(id, messageId, delta, timestamp) → Vercel: {type:'text-delta', id:messageId, delta:text}
ReasoningDelta(id, reasoningId, delta, timestamp) → Vercel: null
ToolCall(id, toolCall, timestamp) → Vercel: serialized tool call
ToolResult(id, toolResult, isStreaming, metadata, timestamp) → Vercel: serialized tool result (skipped if no prior ToolCall)
ProviderToolEvent(id, toolId, type, data, status, timestamp) → Vercel: null
Error(id, code, message, retryable, timestamp) → Vercel: null
StreamEnd(id, finishReason, usage, timestamp) → Vercel: usage/finish data (sent last)
key_methods: ParsesServerSentEvents::parseServerSentEvents($streamBody): Generator — reads SSE line-by-line, strips 'data:' prefix, skips blanks/[DONE], json_decodes, yields
ParsesServerSentEvents::readLine($streamBody): string — byte-by-byte read until \n to prevent batching
HandlesTextStreaming::handleStreamingToolCalls(...): Generator — executes tools, emits ToolResult, recurses via processTextStream
HandlesTextStreaming::mapStreamToolCalls(array): array<ToolCall> — maps raw arrays to ToolCall DTOs
CanStreamUsingVercelProtocol::toVercelProtocolResponse(): Response — Laravel streaming response, SSE format
StreamEvent::withInvocationId(string): self — attaches invocationId to event
StreamEvent::toVercelProtocolArray(): ?array — returns Vercel-compatible array or null to skip output
StreamEvent::broadcast(Channel, bool): void — broadcasts event over Laravel Echo/Pusher
key_conditions: textStartEmitted guard: TextStart emitted only once per text block (lazy, on first non-empty delta)
reasoningStartEmitted guard: ReasoningStart emitted only once per reasoning block
streamStartEmitted guard: StreamStart emitted only once per stream (multi-step tool loops deduplicated by CanStreamUsingVercelProtocol)
depth < maxSteps: agentic loop continues recursively; default maxSteps = round(count(tools)*1.5)
json_last_error === JSON_ERROR_NONE && decoded !== null: malformed SSE lines silently skipped
ToolResult skipped in Vercel output if no prior ToolCall in same stream (cross-step deduplication)
important_notes: All stream events carry invocationId (UUID) for correlation. Each event gets a unique UUID v7 ID. The pipeline is a PHP Generator chain — lazy, pull-based. Multiple gateways share the same ParsesServerSentEvents trait but implement their own HandlesTextStreaming variant per provider's event format. CanStreamUsingVercelProtocol is used on StreamableAgentResponse. The Vercel x-vercel-ai-ui-message-stream:v1 header signals UI SDK compatibility.
